name: Homemade Mexican Meat Mix
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds combination of beef and pork roasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 275°F.
2. Place the meat in a large roasting pan or Dutch oven. Do NOT add salt or water.
3. Cover with a tight lid and roast for 8-10 hours, or until well done. (Alternate method: Cook with 1 cup of water for 35-40 minutes in a pressure cooker.)
4. Drain the meat, reserving juices. Cool the meat; remove any bones.
5. Shred the meat and set aside.
6. Spray a large skillet with nonstick cooking spray. Saute onions and green chilies for 1 minute.
7. Add salsa, garlic powder, flour, salt and cumin. Reduce heat and cook for 1 minute.
8. Stir in the reserved meat and meat juices. Cook for 5 minutes until thickened.
9. Cool completely.
10. Put about 3 cups of meat mixture into each of three 1-quart freezer containers, leaving ½ inch space at the top. Seal and label the container with date and contents. Freeze. Use within 6 months.
11. Makes about 9 cups Homemade Mexican Meat Mix.
